IfcRoof.PredefinedType supports the enumeration value GABLE_ROOF in the authoring/export pipeline; if not, provide an equivalent classification or property and validate gable geometry via REQ-006.

Timber construction is validated via presence of a material with name exactly 'Wood' assigned to IfcWall/IfcSlab/IfcRoof; if using more specific names (e.g., 'Timber', 'CLT'), update the IDS Material.value accordingly.
Room counting is based on IfcSpace instances representing rooms; circulation spaces (e.g., hall) are included as rooms unless excluded by naming convention (not specified).
